name: cloudversify-calendar-ghost-integration
description: Ghost Custom integration and Code Injection foundation for Cloudversify Calendar booking.

scripts.check: node --check src/cloudversify-ghost-booking-element.js && node --check src/ghost-snippet-generator.js && node --check scripts/validate-ghost-integration.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-ghost-widget.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-ghost-snippet-generator.mjs && node --check scripts/package-ghost-release.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-ghost-release.mjs && node scripts/validate-ghost-integration.mjs && node scripts/smoke-ghost-widget.mjs && node scripts/smoke-ghost-snippet-generator.mjs && npm run release:check
scripts.release:check: npm run release:package && npm run release:verify
